title: Rahu Stalam
tagline: Rahu Stalam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirunageswaram Naganathar Temple also known as Rahu Stalam is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tirunageswaram, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam, a to
overview.description: Tirunageswaram Naganathar Temple also known as Rahu Stalam is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tirunageswaram, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam, a town in Tamil Nadu, India. It is significant to the Hindu sect of Saivism as one of the temples associated with the nine planet elements, the Navagraha Stalas, and specifically Rahu. Shiva is worshiped as Naganathar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Piraisoodi Amman.

topPlaces.name: Thirunageswaram
topPlaces.description: Thirunageswaram is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Thirunageswaram is located 6 km east of Kumbakonam.

topPlaces.name: Oppiliappan Temple
topPlaces.description: Oppiliappan Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, located near Thirunageswaram and also known by its old toponym Thiruvinnagar, a village in the outskirts of the Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as the 60th of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Govindapuram, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Govindapuram is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated at a distance of 7 kilometres from Kumbakonam and 27 kilometres from Mayiladuthurai and 1 kilometre from Thiruvidaimarudur.

topPlaces.name: Villiyavarambal
topPlaces.description: Villiyavarambal is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvidaimarudur
topPlaces.description: Thiruvidaimarudur (also spelt as Thiruvidaimaradur or Tiruvidaimarudur) is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is notable for its Mahalingeshwarar Temple, a Hindu shrine for Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Sathanur, Thiruvidaimarudur South
topPlaces.description: Sathanur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town contains the Tirumular Temple, a Hindu shrine.

topPlaces.name: Serugudi
topPlaces.description: Serugudi is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated between Thiruppanandal and Pandanallur.

topPlaces.name: Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur
topPlaces.description: Mahalingeswaraswamy Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tiruvidaimaruthur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is significant to the Hindu sect of Saivism as one of the seven major Shiva temples.

items.note: Thirunageswaram is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Thirunageswaram is located 6 km east of Kumbakonam.

Oppiliappan Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, located near Thirunageswaram and also known by its old toponym Thiruvinnagar, a village in the outskirts of the Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as the 60th of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

Govindapuram is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated at a distance of 7 kilometres from Kumbakonam and 27 kilometres from Mayiladuthurai and 1 kilometre from Thiruvidaimarudur.
Villiyavarambal is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu.

Thiruvidaimarudur (also spelt as Thiruvidaimaradur or Tiruvidaimarudur) is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is notable for its Mahalingeshwarar Temple, a Hindu shrine for Lord Shiva.
Sathanur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town contains the Tirumular Temple, a Hindu shrine.
Serugudi is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated between Thiruppanandal and Pandanallur.

Mahalingeswaraswamy Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tiruvidaimaruthur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is significant to the Hindu sect of Saivism as one of the seven major Shiva temples.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rahu Stalam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rahu Stalam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rahu Stalam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (85 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rahu Stalam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rahu Stalam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rahu Stalam?
faq.a: Stays in Rahu Stalam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rahu Stalam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thirunageswaram, Oppiliappan Temple, Govindapuram, Thanjavur, Villiyavarambal, Thiruvidaimarudur.
